channel.title: Generative-AI on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Generative-AI on Junho Lee

item.title: Designing AI Workflows with UI Data
item.description: A practical look at using UI data, design tokens, and prompt analysis to make AI-assisted design work repeatable.

item.title: Overcoming NotebookLM's Generation Limits with Script-Based Control
item.description: When NotebookLM stops at 20 slides, most people just give up. Designate a single master script as the source and push through with code-style commands to generate 40 slides.
